query:
-- Contar imóveis com status de baixa cumulativamente até cada mês
SELECT 
  'Até Janeiro 2026' as periodo,
  COUNT(*) as total_acumulado,
  COUNT(*) - LAG(COUNT(*), 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY 1) as diferenca_mes
FROM properfyProperties
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale'
AND chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
AND updatedAt <= '2026-01-31'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Até Fevereiro 2026',
  COUNT(*),
  COUNT(*) - LAG(COUNT(*), 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY 1)
FROM properfyProperties
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale'
AND chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
AND updatedAt <= '2026-02-28'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'Até Março 2026',
  COUNT(*),
  COUNT(*) - LAG(COUNT(*), 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY 1)
FROM properfyProperties
WHERE chrTransactionType = 'sale'
AND chrStatus IN ('REMOVED', 'RENTED', 'IN_TERMINATION')
AND updatedAt <= '2026-03-31'
